name: Fresh Fruit Ice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup strawberries, peaches or other fresh fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in the cold water.
2. Stir over low heat until dissolved.
3. Mix in the juices, sugar and sliced fruit.
4. Place mixture in the freezer until almost set.
5. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed until creamy but fluffy.
6. Cover and return to the freezer.
7. If fruit ice is made before serving, rebeat it and return to the freezer for a brief period.
Yield: 8 (90 calorie) servings.
